scripts.dev: SUBSTRAT_STACK=1 concurrently -k -n stack,console -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @substrat-run/demo-fsm dev" "pnpm --filter @substrat-run/console dev"
scripts.dev:connected: SUBSTRAT_STACK=1 CONTROL_PLANE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788 CP_SKIP_SEED=1 concurrently -k -n control-plane,vertical,console -c yellow,blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @substrat-run/control-plane-api dev" "pnpm --filter @substrat-run/demo-fsm dev" "pnpm --filter @substrat-run/console dev"
